intro: Kalabotis pallens, also known as Asian snake flower, is a flowering plant native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its delicate white or pink flowers and slender stems. The health benefits of Kalabotis pallens include its potential anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in traditional medicine for treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
